footer.intro: Your reliable China freight forwarding partner for overseas forwarders.

home.metaTitle: QianHao Logistics | China Freight Forwarding Partner
home.metaDescription: NVOCC-registered China-origin freight forwarding partner for overseas forwarders.
home.heroText: One-stop China-origin logistics support for global freight forwarders: sea, air, land, customs coordination, documentation, and shipment handover.
home.whyText: For a new forwarding brand, credibility comes from clear scope, verified credentials, and honest placeholders where details are still being confirmed.
home.why1: NVOCC is the confirmed qualification anchor.
home.why2: Led by a founder with 18 years in freight forwarding.
home.why3: No fake customer logos, case studies, or public freight rates.
home.why4: Representative imagery is clearly marked until real photos are available.
home.workTitle: A simple forwarding workflow for partner operations.

about.metaTitle: About QianHao Logistics | China Freight Partner
about.metaDescription: QianHao Logistics is a Qingdao-based China-origin forwarding partner with NVOCC registration.
about.heroTitle: A China-origin partner built for forwarders
about.heroText: QianHao Logistics presents confirmed credentials carefully and keeps founder, membership, and operating details as confirmation items until supporting material is supplied.
about.companyTitle: QianHao Logistics, QINGDAO QIANHAO INTERNATIONAL LOGISTICS CO.,LTD
about.companyText: Founded in 2025 in Qingdao, the company is positioned as a China-origin forwarding partner for overseas freight forwarders.
about.founderText: QianHao Logistics is founded by a freight forwarding veteran with 18 years of industry experience. After nearly two decades moving international cargo across global trade lanes, the founder established QianHao to be the reliable China-origin partner that overseas forwarders actually want to work with.
about.capabilityTitle: A controlled operating model for a new forwarding brand.
about.capabilityText: The site favors process clarity over inflated claims, which is especially important for a company founded in 2025.
about.capability1: Experienced guidance with a standardized team process
about.valueText: Professional peer-to-peer communication for forwarder partners.
about.qualificationsText: NVOCC registered. WCA membership in progress; other memberships available on request.

services.metaDescription: China-origin sea, air, land, and multimodal forwarding services for overseas freight forwarders.
services.heroText: A practical service structure for overseas forwarders that need origin-side coordination, documentation, booking, customs support, and handover.
services.scopeTitle: Operational support that maps to real forwarding work.
services.scopeText: Booking, trucking, customs coordination, cargo insurance support, documentation, and destination handover are presented as service scope, not unsupported guarantees.
services.scopePending: Operating scope confirmed per shipment inquiry.

routes.metaDescription: Core strengths in Africa, South America, and Southeast Asia, with broader coverage. Transit, schedule, and carrier confirmed per shipment.
routes.heroTitle: China-origin routes for overseas forwarder partners
routes.heroText: Core strengths in Africa, South America, and Southeast Asia, with broader coverage across Europe, North & Central America, and Oceania. Transit time, schedule, and carrier are confirmed per shipment.
routes.overviewText: We don't publish fixed freight rates or invented schedules. Every quote is based on real shipment details — origin, destination, cargo, and timing.

contact.metaTitle: Contact QianHao Logistics | Request a Freight Quote
contact.metaDescription: Request a China-origin freight quote from QianHao Logistics with origin, destination, cargo, and timing details.
contact.heroText: Share shipment details for origin-side quote coordination. Include origin, destination, cargo, volume, and timing so we can respond accurately.
contact.formTitle: Tell us what the shipment needs.
contact.formText: For freight forwarder partners, useful quote requests usually include origin, destination, cargo type, volume, and timing expectations.
contact.include1: Origin and destination ports or airports
contact.include2: Cargo type, container, CBM, KG, or dimensions
contact.include4: Required scope: trucking, customs, insurance, delivery
contact.responsePending: Quote response commitment to be confirmed.

serviceDetail.scopeTitle: Origin-side forwarding support with confirmed details by inquiry.
serviceDetail.scopeText: This page keeps operational facts transparent: route parameters, schedules, carrier resources, and memberships are confirmed per inquiry before booking.
serviceDetail.quoteText: Share origin, destination, cargo, and timing so the team can quote by real shipment conditions.
serviceDetail.paramsTitle: Route and schedule details are confirmed per inquiry.
serviceDetail.ctaTitle: No public rates. Quote by shipment details.
